string 2: Ah... A challenger.
{next}Get ready to lose!
{next}Are you the Card King?
{next}A challenger...? Huh...?

Hmph. You are in quite a hurry... Actually, that will just
make this easier for me.

Indeed I am... The one and only King of Cards! I reign
supreme from my throne!

Do not play the innocent with me... Huh? You mean to say you
really don't know?

Now, let us see whether you have what it takes to defeat the
mighty Card King!
{next}Let's do this.
{end}Sorry. I just remembered I have to leave.
Hehe. Win or lose, I am looking forward to this encounter.

Go and deal with your prior engagement, then. I do not want
any excuses when you lose.
Let the battle... begin!

That was a rather close battle... I just barely managed to
emerge victorious.

I enjoyed our encounter here today. I would welcome another
challenge if you are willing.

Impossible! How could I lose?! I guess you truly are worthy
of the name "champion."

Congratulations. You are now the Card King who rules over
both worlds!
{next}So it was you, Leopardmon...?
{next}You got hooked on playing cards?
{next}I'm the Class 2 Unified Champion.

Yes, I have come to this world in search of even more
powerful card battlers.

I can tell by the way you hold your hand that you are
familiar with military strategy.

And, as such, you will now have twice the number of
challengers coming for your title.

In recognition of your strength, I should like to give you
this card.

Now, then... I shall remain here as the Card King until the
final battle.

I will venture to the rendezvous point when the time comes.
Never fear. But, for now, allow me to maintain my alter ego.
I ask that you do not mention my presence here to anyone else.

I no longer have any rewards to give you, but would you care
for another battle?
{next}Yes, I accept your challenge.
{end}Maybe some other time.

I shall place the shimmering crown of victory upon my head
once more!
I see...

It appears I have won this particular battle. I eagerly
await our next encounter.

Most impressive... There was much that I could learn from
that battle.

Long time, no see. You haven't changed a bit, so I instantly
knew it was you. Recognize me?

How's that fella I played tag with doing? Time sure does
fly.

You know... I never thought you'd get so good you'd trounce
even the Card King.
{next}Wait... It's you?!
{next}Where is the true Card King?
{next}Um, who are you, again?

Thanks for giving me the reaction I'd hoped for. I'm glad
that you remember me.
Come on. It's me! I'm the true Card King!

Y-You don't remember...? I said some pretty mean things to
that fella back then...

...Now, the time has come! There can only be one true Card
King!
Let the battle... begin!
{next}Bring it on!
{end}Now is not the time.

I've waited a long time to hear those words, probably since
the day we met!

Dammit. Way to ruin the moment. If you have business to take
care of, just hurry up.

Now, show me! Show me the card techniques you've honed over
your epic journey!

It would appear I have not met my match just yet. It's so
very lonely at the top.

Incredible... Outstanding! You're the first one I've met who
surpasses me in skill!

At last, I can assume the role of challenger. And you'll be
the keystone of my quest!

Now that I have something to aspire to, I can enjoy the game
again! We must play again!

I've been waiting! I trust you're ready to have a card
battle now?
{next}Sure, let's do it.
{end}I'll pass.
That's the spirit! Now, have at you!
Too busy, are you? Come and see me again when you have time.

I win this time! But this is not the end, is it? I look
forward to our next match!

I lost... but I also had fun. And so we will play again. You
can count on that!
